# Vehicle Leasing Associates (UK)

> Expert lease consultants for mainstream vehicle manufacturers, based in Exeter, UK. Vehicle Leasing Associates provides transparent, cost-effective leasing solutions on new vans, pickup trucks and cars — petrol, diesel or electric. Trading as VLA Media Ltd, the company has served builders, plumbers, electricians and other tradespeople since the early 1990s.

## About

- **Business name:** Vehicle Leasing Associates (UK) — VLA Media Ltd
- **Sector:** Vehicle leasing consultancy / brokerage
- **Location:** Exeter, United Kingdom (serves customers nationwide)
- **Established:** Early 1990s; 20+ years' specialist experience
- **Opening hours:** 9am – 8pm, 7 days a week
- **Phone:** 07352 816278 (+44 7352 816278)
- **Email:** vla.uk@mail.com
- **WhatsApp:** https://wa.me/447352816278

## What they do

Vehicle Leasing Associates are lease consultants — not tied to any single manufacturer or funder. They guide customers into cost-effective leases using many years of marketing experience, with an emphasis on funding options and benefits. They are associated with one of Europe's leading new vehicle funding institutions. Fleet discounts are available to individuals, and both businesses (self-employed, sole traders, SMEs, limited companies) and employed individuals are welcome.

### Leasing solutions
- Purchase Lease
- Contract Lease
- Finance Lease
- All options available

### Funding / finance terms explained
- **PCH (Personal Contract Hire)** — leasing; hand the vehicle back at the end; often the cheapest monthly payment; mileage allowances apply.
- **PCP (Personal Contract Purchase)** — option to buy at the end via a balloon payment (GMFV); more affordable than HP.
- **HP (Hire Purchase)** — you own the vehicle at the end; most expensive monthly; no mileage limits.
- **BCH (Business Contract Hire)** — long-term business rental with tax advantages; commercial vehicles attract 100% tax relief.
- **Finance Lease** — leasing with an ownership feel.

## Vehicle categories

- **Small / Medium Cars** — e.g. Fiat 500, Hyundai i10, Kia Picanto, Audi A1, Renault Zoe (EV). From ~£100–£500 per month.
- **Small Vans** — e.g. Renault Kangoo, Toyota Proace, Nissan Townstar, Ford Connect, Citroen Berlingo, VW Caddy.
- **Medium Vans** — e.g. Ford Transit, Mercedes Vito, Peugeot Expert, Fiat Scudo, Vauxhall Vivaro, Renault Trafic, VW Transporter.
- **Large Vans** — e.g. Nissan NV Cargo, Renault Master, Mercedes Sprinter, Ford Transit (EV), VW Crafter.
- **Pickup Trucks** — available from all major manufacturers.

Flexible deposit schemes: 3, 6, 9 or 12 months' initial payment, or part exchange.

## Why lease a new vehicle (vs. buying used)
- No MOT concerns for 3 years
- No road tax cost (included in lease)
- Full cover warranty
- No devaluation / depreciation risk
- Up-to-date improved economy
- Fixed monthly budgeting

## Electric vehicles
The company actively advises on EVs: lower running costs, less maintenance, no tailpipe emissions, no congestion charge in London, instant torque and an easy, quiet drive. Customers are encouraged to swap their current fuel cost for a lease on a brand-new electric model.

## Contact / Call to action
Request a personalised quote via the website form (vehicle of interest, manufacturer/type, annual mileage, timescale, contact details), call 07352 816278, email vla.uk@mail.com, or message on WhatsApp.

## Notes
Not a licensed credit broker or finance house directly; all sales operations are conducted via a licensed credit broker/finance house, and lease contracts include commission via the recommended broker or manufacturer's dealership. Offers subject to status, availability and terms. You must be 18 or over. VAT at 20% may be payable.
